'''Mitt'swe'kleoni''', also known by his core name of '''Tswek''', was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] who led a delegation to the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] in [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]], to protest to [[Cal Omas]] and the [[Jedi High Council (New Jedi Order)|Masters' Council]] about the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] survivors of the [[Myrkr strike team]] allying with the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]]. Gray-haired and venerable, he was apparently older than Aristocra [[Chaf'orm'bintrano]], and is thus likely to have been born no later than around [[45 BBY/Legends|45 BBY]].<ref name="JK" />
